fields.description: Disable to stop sending and receiving emails form this cluster.
fields.label: Enabled

fields.description: MX record priority for handling inbound mail. Lower values have higher priority.
fields.label: Priority

fields.description: Include this cluster in MX records to receive emails.
fields.label: Inbound

fields.description: Use this cluster to send outbound emails.
fields.label: Outbound

fields.description: Allow users to configure encryption at rest for their data.
fields.label: Enable encryption at rest

fields.description: Encrypt messages that are manually appended by the user using JMAP or IMAP.
fields.label: Encrypt on append

fields.description: Default language to use when language detection is not possible.
fields.label: Default Language

fields.description: Username for administrative access to the cluster.
fields.label: Username

fields.description: Password for administrative access to the cluster.
fields.label: Password

fields.description: The key used to encrypt gossip messages.
fields.label: Encryption Key

fields.description: Key for authenticating HTTP requests. Generate one via Actions > Generate API Key.
fields.label: API Key

fields.description: URL where HTTP requests are sent before being forwarded to mail servers.
fields.label: Base URL

fields.description: Manage data, blob, full-text, and lookup stores.
fields.label: Stores

fields.description: Public IPv4 addresses assigned to this cluster.
fields.label: IPv4 Addresses

fields.description: Public IPv6 addresses assigned to this cluster.
fields.label: IPv6 Addresses

fields.description: Manage SMTP, IMAP, HTTP, and other listeners.
fields.label: Listeners

fields.description: Stores user accounts, passwords, email addresses, and settings. Used for authentication, email validation, and account management.
fields.label: Directory Storage

fields.description: Core storage unit where email metadata, folders, and various settings are stored. Essentially, it contains all the data except for large binary objects (blobs).
fields.label: Data Storage

fields.description: Used for storing large binary objects such as emails, sieve scripts, and other files.
fields.label: Blob Storage

fields.description: Dedicated to indexing for full-text search, enhancing the speed and efficiency of text-based queries.
fields.label: Full Text Index Storage

fields.description: Key-value storage used primarily by the SMTP server and anti-spam components.
fields.label: In-Memory Storage

fields.description:
Specifies how often tombstoned messages are deleted from the database. 

*  *  *  *  *
┬  ┬  ┬  ┬  ┬
│  │  │  │  │
│  │  │  │  └ day of week (0 - 6) (0 is Sunday)
│  │  │  └───── month (1 - 12)
│  │  └────────── day of month (1 - 31)
│  └─────────────── hour (0 - 23)
└──────────────────── minute (0 - 59)

---

* - Any value
/ - Step values
fields.label: Frequency (Cron)

fields.description: How long to keep changes history for JMAP and IMAP clients.
fields.label: Changes History (Days)

fields.description: How long to keep messages in the Trash and Junk Mail folders before auto-expunging.
fields.label: Trash Auto-Expunge (Days)

fields.description: The UDP port the gossip protocol will bind to.
fields.label: Bind Port

fields.description: FQDN of the proxy or load balancer forwarding requests to mail servers.
fields.label: Cluster
